title: Notification No.64/2002-Cus(NT),dt. 24.10.2002
text: 24th October, 2002 Notification No. 64 /2002-Customs (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue No. 63/2002-Customs (N.T.), dated the 3rd October, 2002 namely:- In the said notification, for the words and figures "25th October, 2002", the words and figures "1st November, 2002", shall be substituted. D.S. Garbyal Under Secretary to the Government of India F.No. 437/8/2001-Cus. IV Note:- The principal notification No. 63/2002-Customs(N.T.), dated the 3rd October, 2002 was published in the Gazette of India Extraordinary Part II, Section 3, sub-section (i), dated the 3rd October , 2002 under G.S. R. No. 676 (E). -- 1 of 1 --
